description: Bedrock image-provider priority for SWCA Twin Card avatar generation. Use active inference profile IDs before falling back to the normalized uploaded photo.

us.stability.stable-image-control-struct.purpose: Preserve the selfie structure while generating a clean 2D wellness avatar.
us.stability.stable-image-control-struct.bedrockInvocation: InvokeModel through the active US inference profile ID.

us.stability.stable-style-transfer-v1:0.purpose: Apply a VeeVee reference avatar style to the uploaded selfie after a style reference image is configured.
us.stability.stable-style-transfer-v1:0.bedrockInvocation: InvokeModel through the active US inference profile ID.

us.stability.stable-image-style-guide-v1.purpose: Keep avatar outputs aligned to a brand look when direct structure generation is unavailable.
us.stability.stable-image-style-guide-v1.bedrockInvocation: InvokeModel through the active US inference profile ID.

fallback_original_photo_card.purpose: Use the normalized uploaded photo inside the premium card frame when AI generation cannot produce a usable image.

notes: Do not use amazon.nova-canvas-v1:0 for expo V1; it is legacy in the production account and was denied by Bedrock.
Do not move to amazon.titan-image-generator-v2:0 as the next default; it is also legacy.
Style Transfer should become the preferred branded option only after a strong VeeVee avatar style reference image is configured.
